pageContext.name: Boba Fett
pageContext.description: Having survived the Sarlacc™ pit on Tatooine™, Boba Fett reclaimed his armor and took over the throne at Jabba's Palace™. No longer just a hired gun, he reinvents himself on Tatooine alongside Fennec Shand™ to be a respected leader to the people of Mos Espa™.   Sideshow and Hot Toys are delighted to officially introduce the new detailed Boba Fett Sixth Scale Figure from the live-action series!  This Star Wars collectible figure features a newly developed Boba Fett helmet and armor, finely tailored under-suit, a jetpack, a blaster pistol, a blaster rifle, a gaffi stick, and a sand-themed figure base!   Face off with the stranger from the desert with this new Boba Fett collectible figure!
